complaint: I've been getting recurring fevers and feeling extremely exhausted for the past 3 days.

simulated_answers.fever: I've been having fevers for three days. It comes and goes.
simulated_answers.fatigue: I feel very weak, like I can't even walk to the market.
simulated_answers.chills: Yes, when the fever comes, I get severe chills and shivering.
simulated_answers.cough: No, I don't have any cough.
simulated_answers.headache: No, my head doesn't hurt, it's just the fever.
simulated_answers.pain: My whole body feels heavy but I don't have sharp pains anywhere.
simulated_answers.nausea: No vomiting or feeling sick to my stomach.
simulated_answers.medication: I took some paracetamol from a nearby local shop, but it didn't help.
simulated_answers.mosquito: I work in the fields, so there are a lot of mosquitoes in the evening.
simulated_answers.insect: I work in the fields, so there are a lot of mosquitoes and insects in the evening.
simulated_answers.water: There is a lot of stagnant standing water near the fields where I work.
simulated_answers.bite: I do get bitten by insects a lot while working in the fields.
simulated_answers.travel: No, I haven't traveled anywhere recently.
simulated_answers.tick: No, I haven't seen any ticks.
simulated_answers.symptom: Just the fever, exhaustion, and chills.
